name: trace_window_commit_latency
description: v2.7.3 W3 stub (profile lands in W3): commit a window change on the 6-task fixture and measure OPLATENCY around the commit dispatch -> window_commit_budget <= 2000ms (1s p50 target, SR-WIN-28/D3); the op-phase dump asserts fastPath=false (window commits are hard-ineligible for the scene-diff fast path) and PP_PROJ/PP_ROWY rewritten to match the new window (SR-WIN-24); BOTH the in-place reconcile and delete+re-emit commit paths are measured and recorded before any optimization (latency-truth rule); no content flash during the structural commit (paint lock engaged per SR-WIN-25).
